heading: Public use of grounds
label: 6302 Public use of grounds
text: Public travel in, and occupancy of, the grounds specified under are restricted to the sidewalks and other paved surfaces, except in the National Zoological Park.section 6301 of this title
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)630240:193.o, .Oct. 24, 1951, ch. 559, § 265 Stat. 634
